name: K.P.R. Mill Limited
summary: K.P.R. Mill Limited, together with its subsidiaries, operates as an integrated apparel manufacturing company in India and internationally. It operates through three segments: Textile, Sugar, and Others. The company offers yarn, and knitted fabrics; and readymade garments comprising casual, sports, active, sleep, and work wear for men and women, as well as kids wear, and men's innerwear products and athleisure products. It also produces sugar; ethanol; green energy through co-gen power; and wind power, as well as acts as a dealer for AUDI cars. The company also exports its products. K.P.R. Mill Limited was founded in 1984 and is based in Coimbatore, India.
